name: Beloved in my heart
original_name: หว่ออ้ายหนี่ เธอที่รัก
overview: Yang Mi returns to Thailand after breaking up with her Thai-Chinese boyfriend, Chen An. On her trip back, she met with handsome photographer, Dan Thai, whom she got into trouble with. When they are back in Thailand, coincidentally she moves next door to him and even ends up working together with him. She found out later that he’s not a straight guy. When their relationship grows to become more intimate, Chen An came back for Yang Mi. Chen An suffered memory loss due to an accident and all he could remember is that Yang Mi is the love of his life. What will Yang Mi do when her ex-boyfriend makes a comeback while new love is about to take shape?

trailers.title: หว่ออ้ายหนี่เธอที่รัก / Wo Ai Ni Tur Tee Ruk (2021)
